services.title: Productized engineering — fixed scope, fixed price.

items.q: Do you work remote or on-site?
items.a: Both. Mostly remote, with regular visits to Amsterdam, Utrecht or Eindhoven when useful for the engagement.
€800–880 per day for hourly engagements. Most work is fixed-price based on the services above.

items.q: Do you work with one client at a time?
items.a: No. I work with multiple clients in parallel — usually max 12–15 days per month per engagement. This protects independence and focus.
Fixed prices are agreed up front. Changes go through a short change request with adjusted price and timeline.

items.q: Do you work in Dutch or English?
items.a: Both. Documentation and code in English (industry standard). Meetings and email per preference — Dutch or English.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.lead: A 15-minute call gives both of us quick clarity on whether there's a fit.

services.title: Services · Jaize
services.description: Five fixed-price engagements for AI integration, MVP development, and technical leadership. Clear, predictable, production-ready.

hero.headline: Productized engineering. Fixed scope, fixed price, fixed timeline.
hero.lead: Five ways I work with Dutch scale-ups and SMEs. No quote ballet — pick what fits.

items.name: AI Integration Audit
items.for: CTO or founder who needs to know where AI actually adds value to the product.
items.summary: Quick technical review of your stack, identification of 5–10 highest-impact AI integration opportunities, and a prioritized roadmap.
delivers: Day 1–2: codebase walkthrough and product context
Day 3: research best-fit AI tooling for your stack
Day 4: prototype of one high-impact integration
Day 5: report with roadmap, cost projection, 90-day plan
items.excludes: Implementation of the roadmap (separate engagement, e.g. AI Pipeline).

items.name: Production-Ready MVP
items.for: Pre-seed or seed startups validating PMF who want their MVP launched in 4 weeks.
items.summary: Full backend + frontend + deployment of a validated MVP. I build, you get users.
delivers: NestJS or Node + database, REST or GraphQL API
Next.js or React frontend, responsive and tested
JWT or OAuth authentication
Deployment on AWS, GCP or Cloudflare
Simple admin / dashboard
Source code in your repo, documented
items.excludes: Native mobile apps and complex AI features (use other engagements).

items.name: Embedded Tech Lead
items.for: Series A scale-ups whose senior team is stretched and needs architectural direction.
items.summary: Architecture review, team coaching, and roadmap. Senior thinking without a full-time CTO.
delivers: Week 1: architecture review (current state, scaling challenges, debt)
Week 2: roadmap (12-month tech roadmap, hiring plan)
Week 3: team coaching (code reviews, 1-on-1 mentoring)
Week 4: handover (documentation, hiring rubric, follow-up advice)
Up to 16 hours per week engagement
30 days async support after wrap-up
items.excludes: Day-to-day feature development — that's the Engineer role.

items.name: Production AI Pipeline
items.for: Mid-stage companies with custom AI needs — computer vision, LLM workflows, RAG systems, classification at scale.
items.summary: Production-ready AI inference pipelines. Set up, deployed, and monitored.
delivers: Week 1: discovery and scope confirmation
Week 2: data pipeline
Weeks 3–4: model integration or training
Week 5: deployment and monitoring
Week 6: documentation and handover
Stack options: NVIDIA Triton + YOLO/ResNet (vision), LangGraph + OpenAI/Anthropic (LLM), Pinecone/Weaviate (RAG)
items.excludes: System maintenance after week 6 (separate retainer or Fractional CTO).

items.name: Fractional CTO
items.for: 5–15 person startups without full-time technical leadership who need senior thinking on strategic and tactical level.
items.summary: One day per week strategic plus tactical technical leadership for your product and team.
delivers: 1 day per week (Wednesdays default) on-site or remote
Weekly 1-on-1 with founder or CEO
Code reviews, architecture decisions, hiring support
Vendor evaluations
Async support during the week
items.excludes: Full-time feature engineering and production on-call.

cta.title: Not sure which fits?
cta.lead: Book a 15-minute call — I'll honestly tell you which one (or none) fits.

work.title: Work · Jaize
work.description: Three recent engagements — AI computer vision platform, scaling a tech team from 2 to 12+, and backend for a receipt-management platform.

hero.headline: What I've built recently.
hero.lead: Three engagements with concrete outcomes. No marketing, no logo soup — just what I shipped.

cases.sector: AI computer vision · Industrial quality control
cases.challenge: Replace a legacy quality control platform with an AI-driven system that automatically classifies millions of product images.
cases.approach: Full stack built from scratch: NestJS backend (37+ modules), Vue.js frontend (49 pages), PostgreSQL, and NVIDIA Triton inference pipeline with ResNet and YOLO. Hybrid on-prem plus cloud setup.
outcomes: 3M+ AI inference calls delivered in production
5 languages supported with multi-locale annotation workflows
~3TB of product data migrated with zero data loss
Automated backups (pg_dump + offsite NAS) and zero-downtime deployments

cases.challenge: Grow a 2-person engineering team to production-ready velocity at a typical startup with rapidly growing product demands.
cases.approach: Inherited 2-person team grown to 12+ engineers (mobile, backend, web, cloud). React Native with shared backend for iOS plus Android. Reported to board on technical strategy.
outcomes: Engineering team grown from 2 → 12+ in 18 months
React Native app published on App Store and Google Play
OAuth2 / Firebase Auth with RBAC across web and mobile
Full DevOps / CI/CD setup on AWS

cases.challenge: Extend a receipt-scanning app with OCR pipeline, expense categorization and analytics API.
cases.approach: Built NestJS backend with OCR pipeline, JWT authentication, receipt categorization and expense analytics API. Deployed on GCP with CI/CD.
outcomes: Backend with OCR pipeline live in production

cta.title: Similar engagement in mind?
cta.lead: Let's talk — I'll tell you in 15 minutes whether I can add value.

about.title: About · Jaize
about.description: Senior software engineer and tech lead, based in IJlst. M.Sc. Big Data and IoT. 5+ years of professional experience across startup, scale-up and agritech.

hero.headline: Abdellah Jaize · Senior Software Engineer.
hero.lead: I build production-ready software end-to-end — backend, frontend, AI integration and infrastructure. 5+ years professional.

bio: I'm a Moroccan software engineer based in IJlst, Friesland. My work focuses on building products end-to-end — not one layer, but the whole product.

I started as a full-stack engineer and became tech lead at a sportstech startup where I grew the engineering team from 2 to 12+. After that I worked 2.5 years as sole technical owner of an AI computer vision platform for a Dutch agritech company — building everything: application, ML pipelines, hybrid infrastructure and production operations.
From July 2026 I work independently for Dutch scale-ups and SMEs that need senior engineering and AI integration help.

approach.title: My approach
items: End-to-end ownership — I build the whole system, not one layer
Fixed price and fixed scope where possible — no quote ballet
Production-ready from day 1 — monitored, tested, deployed
Honest assessments — if I think something doesn't fit, I'll say so

credentials.title: Background
education: M.Sc. Big Data & IoT, ENSAM Casablanca (2019–2021)
B.Sc. Big Data & Massive Data Management, FST Settat (2018–2019)
certs: NVIDIA DLI: Fundamentals of Deep Learning (2021)
NVIDIA DLI: Building Intelligent Recommender Systems (2022)
